name: Sugar - Free Brownies
recipeInstructions:
1. Soak the chopped walnuts in 3 tablespoons of unsweetened apple juice concentrate.
2. In a bowl, sift together the baking powder and cocoa with the whole wheat flour.
3. Make a well in the center of the dry ingredients.
4. Measure 1 1/3 cups of unsweetened apple juice concentrate, oil, egg white, and mashed banana into a separate measuring cup.
5. Add all the liquid ingredients to the dry ingredients and mix until just combined.
6. Spread the batter evenly into a greased 13 x 9 inch pan.
7. Sprinkle the walnuts over the batter and use the back of a spoon to spread them evenly throughout.
8. Bake at 350 degrees Fahrenheit for 30 minutes.
9. Allow the brownies to cool slightly before covering and storing in the freezer. Yield: 24 servings.
